title: ‘Flying White House’: Donald Trump unveils new 'Air Force One' gifted by Qatar — all you need to know
content:
Donald Trump has unveiled a new aircraft, being called the 'Flying White House'.
*   It's referred to as his 'new Air Force One'.
*   This private jet was gifted to him by Qatar.

title: Who is Vivek Aggarwal? IAS officer appointed as vice president of FATF in a first for India
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   IAS officer Vivek Aggarwal has been appointed as the vice president of the Financial Action Task Force (FATF).
*   This appointment marks a significant first for India on the international body.
*   The news highlights Aggarwal's profile as a prominent Indian civil servant taking on a key global role.

title: World Bank approves $1.5 billion financing to support India’s reform programmes
content:
The World Bank has approved $1.5 billion in financing.
*   This funding is designated for India.
*   Its purpose is to support the country's ongoing reform programmes.

title: Jio mulls plans to get into satellite communications
content:
Jio is exploring plans to enter the satellite communications sector.
*   The company is currently in the deliberation or planning phase for this venture.
*   This signifies a potential new business vertical for the telecom giant.

title: Sebi to reintroduce open market share buybacks via exchanges; eases intra-day borrowing rules for MFs
content:
Sebi is set to reintroduce open market share buybacks.
*   These buybacks will now be conducted specifically via stock exchanges.
*   Intra-day borrowing rules for Mutual Funds (MFs) are being eased by the regulator.

title: Board approves Jio IPO, DRHP to be filed on June 19 with SEBI: Mukesh Ambani
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Jio's Board has officially approved its Initial Public Offering (IPO).
*   The Draft Red Herring Prospectus (DRHP) for the IPO is scheduled to be filed with SEBI on June 19.
*   This announcement was made by Mukesh Ambani.

title: Supreme Court declares right to walk on footpath a fundamental right, wants law
content:
The Supreme Court has declared the right to walk on footpaths as a fundamental right.
*   This decision elevates footpath access to a basic and essential entitlement for citizens.
*   The Court has also called for a specific law to be enacted to further define and protect this right.

title: Supreme Court flags ‘brain drain’ in legal profession, directs creation of fund for young lawyers
content:
The Supreme Court has identified a significant "brain drain" issue within the legal profession.
*   This concern highlights the loss of talent, particularly among young lawyers, from the field.
*   To address this problem, the Court has directed the creation of a dedicated fund to support young lawyers.

title: Supreme Court refuses urgent hearing on plea to defer June 21 NEET-UG retest
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Supreme Court has refused an urgent hearing.
*   The plea sought to defer the upcoming NEET-UG retest.
*   The retest is currently scheduled for June 21.
